The PHASE4-RESUMABLE-IMPORT decision says imported sources must survive an
interrupted indexing job without duplicate documents, chunks, or timeline events.

This paragraph intentionally repeats enough local context to span multiple chunks.
Singularity remains a local-first, model-agnostic continuous assistant. Its imported
sources feed the same retrieval, context-pack, citation, and inspector contracts.
